headline: Is General Dynamics Corporation (GD) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is GD a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on General Dynamics Corporation on MaxDividends’s Substack by Serhio MaxDividends. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on GD. General Dynamics Corporation’s share was trading at $352.50 as of March 25th. GD’s trailing and forward P/E were 22.38 and 21.23 respectively according to Yahoo […]

headline: General Dynamics Lands a $15.4 Billion Navy Contract
summary: The U.S. Navy is looking for a few good ballistic missile submarines -- and wants General Dynamics to build them.
